headline: Google's AI search is so broken it can 'disregard' what you're looking for
summary: Google's AI Overviews are experiencing issues, sometimes acting like a chatbot. Searching 'disregard' previously yielded an AI chatbot response instead of a summary. This glitch highlights problems with the AI's ability to interpret search intent.

headline: Twelve South's AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
summary: The AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter is now at a significantly reduced price for summer travel. This gadget allows wireless headphones to connect with in-flight entertainment systems. The deal offers one of the best opportunities to purchase this popular travel accessory.

headline: Meta's Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
summary: Meta's new iPhone app, Forum, blends features from Facebook Groups and Reddit-style forums. It integrates a dedicated AI chatbot, reminiscent of Google AI Overviews, to assist users. Forum aims to offer a new platform for community discussions and engagement.

headline: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
summary: Elon Musk's AI chatbot, Grok, is reportedly underperforming and struggling to gain widespread adoption. A Reuters report indicated minimal use by the US government last year. Critics suggest Grok is not an effective or popular 'truth-seeking' AI tool.

headline: Riot Games Says It 'Would Not and Cannot' Use Vanguard Anti-Cheat to Brick PCs After Rumors Spread
summary: Riot Games has publicly denied rumors that its Vanguard anti-cheat system 'bricks' the PCs of cheating players. The company clarified it lacks the capability and intent to cause permanent damage to hardware. Riot moved to squash misinformation spreading among its player base.

headline: Save $2,400 Off the Alienware 16X Aurora RTX 5070 Gaming Laptop
summary: A massive $2,400 discount is available on the Alienware 16X Aurora gaming laptop. This powerful machine features an RTX 5070 GPU, 64GB of RAM, and a 4TB SSD. The deal provides premium gaming performance at a significantly reduced price.

headline: The Gamesir G7 Pro Is My Favorite Gaming Controller for PC, and It's on Sale for Memorial Day
summary: The Gamesir G7 Pro, a highly-rated PC gaming controller, is currently available at a discounted price. AliExpress is offering the controller for $20 less than other retailers. This Memorial Day sale is an ideal opportunity for PC gamers to purchase a top controller.

headline: Save Over 50% Off the Sonos Sub Wireless Subwoofer During the Memorial Day Sale
summary: The Sonos Sub wireless subwoofer is being offered at over 50% off during the Memorial Day Sale. This deal applies to certified refurbished models, ensuring quality. The refurbished units come with the same full one-year warranty as new products.

headline: Attorney general to review teen boys' rape sentences
summary: The Attorney General will review the sentences of three teenage boys involved in a rape case. The boys had initially received non-custodial sentences for their roles in the rape of two girls. This review follows public concern over the perceived leniency of the original judgments.

headline: UK sees hottest day of year as bank holiday travellers face queues
summary: The UK recorded its hottest day of the year, with temperatures soaring to 28.4C in some regions. Bank holiday travelers experienced significant delays at major hubs like the Port of Dover and Birmingham Airport. The warm weather led to increased travel demand, exacerbating congestion.

headline: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
summary: UK scientists are developing a vaccine for the rare Bundibugyo strain of Ebola. This particular strain has a fatality rate of approximately one-third and currently lacks a proven vaccine. The experimental vaccine is expected to be ready for human trials within a few months.

headline: 'Stupid on stilts' - Trump's investigation compensation fund draws ire of Republicans
summary: A $1.8 billion fund, established to compensate individuals 'unfairly' investigated under previous presidents, is facing Republican backlash. Critics within the Republican party have condemned the fund, with one notably labeling it 'stupid on stilts.' The initiative, linked to Donald Trump, has sparked significant controversy.
